owner_operator_stated: Dr. Imaad Shaikh, DDS is Founder/Owner of Access Dental Center; Dr. Zoya Shaikh, DMD is an associate.
notes: Address (276 W Fullerton Ave, Addison IL 60101) and phone (630-628-8884) corroborated exactly on the practice's own contact page. The vendor hint domain (www6.accessdentalcenter.com) was stale; the live site is accessdentalcenter.org. Practice also runs a second location in Naperville. No careers/hiring page found on the site (homepage nav checked: Home, Meet The Doctors, Meet The Team, Services, Contact).

Vendor hint jaindental.com is an unrelated dental clinic in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India — no address/phone match to this Addison, IL record. A directory-attributed domain, familydentalcenter.org, is actually 'Family Dental Center' in Sioux Falls, SD (different doctors, different address/phone) — also not a match. No corroborated website found for Jain Family Dental Ctr / Dr. Manohar Jain at 33 N Addison Rd Ste 106, Addison IL 60101; only third-party directory listings (Yelp, Healthgrades, doctor.com, Facebook) exist, none linking to a verifiable practice-owned site.

Vendor hint 1stfamilydental.com corresponds to a DIFFERENT practice (1st Family Dental of Addison, phone 630-833-8888, doctors Leonard/Chalabiani Nejadazar/Nouna) that shares the same street address (120 E Lake St, Addison IL) but not the record's phone. A wellness.com directory listing for 'Dental Profile' at '120 East Lake Street, Addison, IL 60101' matches this record's exact phone (630-530-2498) but lists no website. This looks like a shared multi-suite office building rather than confirmed ownership succession (no evidence Dental Profile has closed under that name). Since the phone-corroborated business has no discoverable site of its own, and the address-only match belongs to a differently-phoned neighboring practice, treated as no usable website rather than fabricating a match to the vendor hint.

Federal NPPES record for NPI 1568859338 confirms organization name 'SRI WELLNESS CENTER' with DBA 'ADDISON DENTAL CARE' at 190 N Swift Rd Ste G, Addison IL 60101, phone 630-627-7626 — an exact address+phone match, so this is the same legal entity operating under a trade name (not an ownership conflict). The vendor hint domain, addisondentalil.com, belongs to a DIFFERENT, unrelated 'Addison Dental Care' at 1201 W Army Trail Blvd #2 (phone 630-543-8688) — a business-name collision, not this record. The practice's actual domain, addisondental.com, now 301-redirects to an unrelated residency-program website (dead). No live website found for this DBA; could not verify roster or hiring info.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Angela Bogacki Skidmore took over Bartlett Dental Office in 2018 when founder Dr. Timothy A. Ridenour retired after 42 years.
notes: Address (988 S Bartlett Rd, Bartlett IL 60103) and phone (630-289-4288) corroborated exactly on the practice's own site. Dr. Timothy A. Ridenour founded the office in 1977 and officially retired in August 2018; Dr. Angela Bogacki Skidmore is the current owner, matching this record's practice name. No careers/hiring page found (guessed /careers URL returned 404).

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Jamie Hofmeister and business partner Rob Snell purchased the practice from her father, founder Dr. Mark Hofmeister, in April 2021; Jamie is the current owner.
notes: This record's address (1048 Norwood Ln, Bartlett IL 60103) and phone (630-830-6056) exactly match the live site hofmeisterdds.com, but that practice is branded 'Hofmeister Family Dentistry' throughout every source checked (own site, Yelp, WebMD) — no source ever refers to this location as 'Bartlett Family Dental'. Founded 1987 by Mark Hofmeister; ownership was formally sold/transitioned to his daughter Dr. Jamie Hofmeister (with partner Rob Snell) in April 2021. The vendor hint domain bartlettfamilydental.com failed to resolve (TLS certificate error), consistent with 'Bartlett Family Dental' being a stale/incorrect vendor-assigned name rather than the practice's real identity. Flagged as ownership_conflict because the named entity in the input record does not match the confirmed operating practice at this address/phone; this is a multi-provider family practice, NOT a DSO/chain.
